title: JPL Annual Reports
description: NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory, the leading center for robotic exploration of the solar system.
text:
Every year, JPL issues an Annual Report with a review of its accomplishments. As the reports become available in an electronic format, they will be posted here by year.
A newer report outlines JPL’s commitment to continually improving JPL’s sustainability performance. The Sustainability Report is listed under the Annual Report for each year it is available.
